author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — owner-level architectural refactor (cross-cutting type change touching TUI, ACP, session save/load, and the proxy boundary).

**Fix outline:** Introduce pub struct Message { role: Role, content: Content, tool_calls: Vec<ToolCall>, tool_call_id: Option<String> } with pub enum Content { Text(String), Blocks(Vec<ContentBlock>) }. Replace Vec<serde_json::Value> in src/tui/app.rs:274 and :37 (TuiSession.messages) and src/acp.rs:579 (and 22+ get('role').as_str().unwrap_or downstream sites) with the typed form. Reserve serde_json::Value strictly for the provider adapter boundary. Consolidate on the existing proxy::ChatMessage definition rather than introducing a third type.

**Recommendation:** This is a foundational data-model change that ripples through session persistence, ACP wire format, and TUI rendering. Needs owner-level decisions on (a) is the typed Message also the on-disk format or only the in-memory form, (b) backward-compat for existing session files, (c) ChatMessage vs Message naming reconciliation. Not safe as ad-hoc agent work.
